message:
test(proptest): add 18 property tests for trace-JIT and superinstruction modules (bd-3ar8v.4.47)

Superinstructions (9 tests): compile determinism, positive cost delta,
plan ordering, cost model arithmetic, fused < baseline for width >= 2,
signature determinism, disabled compiler empty, width capped by max_window,
support meets min_support.

Trace-JIT (9 tests): JIT cost < fused for width >= 2, tier improvement
non-negative, 3 guards per compiled trace, width matches plan, disabled
never promotes, cache bounded by max, telemetry consistency, guard check
determinism, JIT hit implies no deopt reason.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
